ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "total_simulations" INTEGER /* Total number of simulations in the project */,
  "total_runtime" REAL /* Total runtime of all simulations in the project in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter set */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the parameters belong to */,
  "mach_number" REAL /* Mach number used in the simulation */,
  "eddy_viscosity" REAL /* Eddy viscosity used in the simulation */,
  "nu_tilde" REAL /* Turbulent viscosity used in the simulation */,
  "pressure_coefficient" REAL /* Pressure coefficient used in the simulation */,
  "turbulence_model" TEXT /* Turbulence model used in the simulation */,
  "grid_resolution" TEXT /* Grid resolution used in the simulation */,
  "boundary_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed boundary conditions in a structured format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spatial point */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the point belongs to */,
  "point_0" REAL /* X-coordinate of the point */,
  "point_1" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the point */,
  "point_2" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the point */,
  "eddy_viscosity" REAL /* Eddy viscosity at the point */,
  "mach_number" REAL /* Mach number at the point */,
  "nu_tilde" REAL /* Turbulent viscosity at the point */,
  "pressure_coefficient" REAL /* Pressure coefficient at the point */,
  "time_step" REAL /* Time step of the simulation if it is a transient simulation */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the simulation */,
  "convergence_status" TEXT /* Convergence status of the point (e.g., converged, not converged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the result belongs to */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result (e.g., drag coefficient, lift coefficient) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "result_source" TEXT /* Source of the result (e.g., CFD solver, post-processing tool) */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the simulation (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., boundary conditions, initial conditions) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of the metadata (e.g., setup, conditions) */,
  "metadata_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created or updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)
